name: Citizen Services Chatbot
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.purpose: GPT-4o for conversational citizen assistance — form filling guidance, appointment scheduling, permit status inquiries, FAQ answering, multi-turn service navigation

services.name: Azure AI Translator
services.purpose: Real-time multi-language support — translate citizen queries and bot responses across 100+ languages for diverse municipal populations

services.name: Azure Communication Services
services.purpose: SMS notifications for appointment reminders, permit status updates, chat widget integration for municipal websites, phone call routing for live agent escalation

services.name: Azure AI Search
services.purpose: Semantic search over municipal knowledge base — ordinances, service descriptions, form instructions, FAQ articles, permit requirements, fee schedules

services.name: Cosmos DB
services.purpose: Conversation history, citizen service requests, appointment bookings, permit application status, form submissions, feedback records

enterprise.note: Multi-region, analytical store for service analytics

services.name: Container Apps
services.purpose: Chatbot API backend — conversation orchestration, form workflow engine, appointment scheduler, permit status integration, translation middleware

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: API keys, municipal system integration credentials, citizen PII encryption keys, communication service connection strings

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Chatbot response latency, resolution rates, language distribution, escalation frequency, citizen satisfaction scores

optimization_tips: Route 80% of common queries (hours, locations, fee schedules) through GPT-4o-mini with cached RAG responses — reserve GPT-4o for complex multi-step form guidance and nuanced permit questions, saving 70% on AI costs
Cache frequently requested translations (common phrases, service descriptions, standard responses) to reduce Translator API calls by 50% — municipal content is relatively static
Use AI Search semantic caching for repeated FAQ queries — municipal knowledge base changes infrequently, so 1-hour cache TTL covers most citizen questions
Batch SMS notifications (appointment reminders, status updates) into daily digest windows rather than individual messages — reduces Communication Services costs by 40%
Implement conversation summarization to compress long multi-turn sessions before storing in Cosmos DB — reduces storage costs while preserving context for analytics
Set Azure Cost Management budgets with alerts at 50%, 80%, 100%
